_meta.purpose: Layer-utilization manifests for HAND-AUTHORED deliverables (agent-written prose/boards that no token scan can audit). Each entry declares which core intelligence layers fed the deliverable and JUSTIFIES every core layer it did not use. Enforced by integration_audit.py Check H2: an undeclared or unjustified omission is a P0. This makes 'we built a layer and the deliverable quietly ignored it' impossible to ship silently (PLAYBOOK.md C5/C6).
_meta.rule: When you author or regenerate a deliverable, update its entry IN THE SAME CHANGE. An entry is a claim about the CURRENT file on disk.

dfs_week1_report.html.authored: agent-written Week 1 DFS report (game notes -> summary -> team cases -> best plays)

layers_unused_justified.boom/scheme_fit.json: player-level playoff-week scheme fit is a season-long (W15-17) construct; the weekly report uses the week's own frequency-weighted edges from defense_splits instead
layers_unused_justified.slot_paths.json: draft-slot availability is a best-ball draft construct; no meaning for a DFS weekly slate
layers_unused_justified.stack_menu.json: best-ball stack windows are ADP/draft-capital constructs; DFS stacks are rebuilt from the week's dfs_model templates (correlation_structure)

dfs_week1_report.html.notes: ADP fields of flag_ranks are deliberately excluded (domain rule: ADP is a best-ball price, never a DFS cost proxy). Vegas O/U + team_ceiling blend govern environment ranking per env_blend.py.

strategy_board.json.authored: agent-authored pick-#-specific draft strategies (12 slots x 3 strategies)

layers_unused_justified.weekly-vegas-lines.csv: single-week O/U environments do not drive season-long draft strategy; season environment enters via team_ceiling env drivers
layers_unused_justified.defense_splits.json: weekly opponent softness is a DFS construct; season-long matchup quality enters flag_ranks via the W15-17 weighted smq
layers_unused_justified.offense_profile.json: consumed indirectly: team_ceiling is built FROM offense_profile; the board reads the distilled tier
layers_unused_justified.coordinator_changes_2026.json: consumed indirectly through team_ceiling scheme_upgrade driver and scheme_fit-adjusted flag_ranks
layers_unused_justified.boom/scheme_fit.json: consumed indirectly: flag_ranks smq_pctl_adj already folds scheme fit in
layers_unused_justified.cc_context.json: per-player drilldown context; board strategies operate at the flag_ranks composite level
layers_unused_justified.boom/defensive_profile.json: weekly funnel intelligence; not a draft-capital input

strategy_board.json.notes: Window contract per strategy (earliest/latest/prefer/p_avail) from slot_paths availability model.

analysis/team_analysis_1.md.authored: agent-written team analyses (ARI-DAL), source for bestball_2026_team_analysis.pdf

layers_unused_justified.weekly-vegas-lines.csv: season dossier, not weekly DFS; schedule arc uses matchup layers instead
layers_unused_justified.defense_splits.json: weekly DFS construct; playoff matchup strength enters via flag_ranks smq
layers_unused_justified.slot_paths.json: draft-slot mechanics live on the strategy board, not the team dossier
layers_unused_justified.boom/defensive_profile.json: own-defense shootout conditions enter via team_ceiling drivers

analysis/team_analysis_1.md.notes: Six-subsection format: verdict, full-season environment, schedule arc, key players, stacks, draft takeaway.
